topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Flutter Basics. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Mobile App Developer roles.
whyItMatters: Flutter Basics is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Flutter Basics in a real-world scenario

advancedProjects: Integrate Flutter Basics into a microservice

companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Flutter Basics
